content.text: I'll run all the sed commands in parallel since they're independent of each other.

input.description: Replace blue shadow 0.2 with indigo in components

input.command: find /Users/ryanvasquez/reading-tracker/components -name "*.tsx" -exec sed -i '' 's/shadow-\[0_0_12px_rgba(8,116,224,0\.3)\]/shadow-[0_0_16px_rgba(79,70,229,0.3)]/g' {} \; && echo "Done: components shadow 0.3" & find /Users/ryanvasquez/reading-tracker/app -name "*.tsx" -exec sed -i '' 's/shadow-\[0_0_12px_rgba(8,116,224,0\.2)\]/shadow-[0_0_16px_rgba(79,70,229,0.25)]/g' {} \; && echo "Done: app shadow 0.2" & find /Users/ryanvasquez/reading-tracker/app -name "*.tsx" -exec sed -i '' 's/shadow-\[0_0_12px_rgba(8,116,224,0\.3)\]/shadow-[0_0_16px_rgba(79,70,229,0.3)]/g' {} \; && echo "Done: app shadow 0.3" & find /Users/ryanvasquez/reading-tracker/app -name "*.tsx" -exec sed -i '' 's/shadow-\[0_0_16px_rgba(8,116,224,0\.4)\]/shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(79,70,229,0.35)]/g' {} \; && echo "Done: app shadow 0.4" & find /Users/ryanvasquez/reading-tracker/app -name "*.tsx" -exec sed -i '' 's/shadow-\[0_0_6px_rgba(16,144,255,0\.4)\]/shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)]/g' {} \; && echo "Done: app progress bar glow" & find /Users/ryanvasquez/reading-tracker/components -name "*.tsx" -exec sed -i '' 's/shadow-\[0_0_6px_rgba(16,144,255,0\.4)\]/shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)]/g' {} \; && echo "Done: components progress bar glow" & wait

content.text:
The remaining `rgba(8,116,224,...)` hits are not ones you targeted — they use different values (`0.15`, `0.1`, `0.4` with a `10px` spread) that were not part of the replacement patterns, so they were intentionally left untouched.

Here is a summary of every change that was made:

**Files modified:**

- `/Users/ryanvasquez/reading-tracker/components/EditBookModal.tsx` — primary button shadow: `0_0_12px_rgba(8,116,224,0.2)` → `0_0_16px_rgba(79,70,229,0.25)`
- `/Users/ryanvasquez/reading-tracker/components/AddArticleModal.tsx` — same shadow swap
- `/Users/ryanvasquez/reading-tracker/components/AddBookModal.tsx` — same shadow swap
- `/Users/ryanvasquez/reading-tracker/components/EditSessionModal.tsx` — same shadow swap
- `/Users/ryanvasquez/reading-tracker/components/CompleteSessionModal.tsx` — same shadow swap
- `/Users/ryanvasquez/reading-tracker/components/SessionDetailModal.tsx` — same shadow swap
- `/Users/ryanvasquez/reading-tracker/components/Quotes.tsx` — two primary button shadows swapped: `0_0_12px_rgba(8,116,224,0.3)` → `0_0_16px_rgba(79,70,229,0.3)`
- `/Users/ryanvasquez/reading-tracker/app/page.tsx` — three replacements:
  - Two primary button shadows (`0.3` variant) → indigo
  - One hover shadow (`0.4` variant) → `0_0_20px_rgba(79,70,229,0.35)`
  - Progress bar glow: `0_0_6px_rgba(16,144,255,0.4)` → `0_0_8px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)`

**What was not changed** (outside the specified patterns): two `rgba(8,116,224,...)` occurrences in `Quotes.tsx` and `app/page.tsx` using `0.1`/`0.15`/`0.4` with a `10px` spread — these did not match any of the target patterns.
